title: Sea-Through Boat
description: Explore the depths like never before with this crystal-clear glass-bottom boat resource pack. See underwater wonders as you glide across the ocean, bringing new life and clarity to your Minecraft adventures.
body: Discover the beauty beneath the waves with **Sea-Through Boat**, a resource pack that transforms your boat’s bottom into crystal-clear glass. Experience immersive underwater views as you sail, revealing the vibrant ocean life and terrain below. Perfect for players who want to explore Minecraft’s oceans with clarity and style.
